case_title: JUAONT BODDEN VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODDEN, JUAONT
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BODDEN, JUAONT
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BODDEN, JUAONT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODDEN, JUAONT AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2023 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LY. PLAINTIFF JUAONT BODDEN IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS KEZIA VILLIAS-MARTINIS. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BODDEN, JUAONT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,065.00, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY COSTS DIRECTLY TO THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BODDEN, JUAONT AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GORDON LEUNG, DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY OPERATIONS. FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO APR-26-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUAONT BODDEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GORDON LEUNG (DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY OPERATIONS). PARTIES AGREED TO CONTINUE TO ALLOW TIME TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO BRING IN WITNESS(S) AT THE NEXT HEARING. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
